ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  DCM Shriram Fine Chemicals Limited (DSFCL) has issued a mandatory communication to shareholders regarding Tax Deduction at Source (TDS) on dividends for FY 2025-26, to be declared at the AGM on July 14, 2026. This significantly impacts shareholders' net dividend receipts as tax rates will vary based on their residential status and submitted documentation, requiring proactive submission of PANs or exemption certificates by July 1, 2026, to avoid higher deductions. This is a standard regulatory compliance update, with no immediate red flags beyond the necessity for shareholders to act to optimize their net dividend.
